hiddenAbility.nerf: When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Turns reduced to x2
When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5
When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Damage reduced to x1.5

tagList.name: Done

common.lore: The warmth of spring. Its fire does not scorch the world, but stirs it awake, melting snow and kindling new life. The cold loosens its hold as it passes, and the land is renewed by heat and light.
